messages.content: I'm doing well, thanks for asking. It's a quiet Monday evening, so I'm all set to help you with anything you need.
Face verification is required before I can run that command.
As of 2026, Slack is enforcing an update for its users, but some users report not having the option to decline it, aiming to ensure continued support and functionality.

I'm looking at a photograph of a man sitting in a room. The man has short dark hair and is wearing a yellow t-shirt and rectangular glasses. He appears to be sitting in a living room with plants on a shelf behind him to the left, and a chair to the right. The room has white walls and a tiled floor.
I'm looking at an image of a man. He has dark skin and short black hair, and he's wearing a yellow t-shirt and black-framed glasses. His right hand is resting on the top of his head.
